commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And all the people saw the thunderings, and the lightnings, and the noise of the trumpet, and the mountain smoking: and when the people saw it, they moved, and stood far off. The Hebrews often substitute one organ of sense for another. Augustine 9. 72; Jeremias ii. ) The Samaritan reads, "the people heard the thunders and the sound of the trumpet, and beheld the lightning. "Henceforward till chap. , Moses and Aaron alone heard the voice of God; and the laws delivered, chap. , were revealed to Moses only.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
